PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. THAT PLAINTIFF(S): STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND RECOVER FROM THE DEFENDANT(S): WAYNE AND VICTOR LAU IN THE SUM OF $2,195.76, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
